$comment: Provenance for the embedded word-frequency lists in src/KeyboardLanguageGuard.Core/Resources. Regenerate with scripts/extract_wordfreq.py. Derived output contains only word strings ordered by frequency.

sources.name: KeyFix hand-authored bigram seed (src/KeyboardLanguageGuard.Core/Resources/bigrams-en.txt)
sources.license: original work, MIT (same as the repository)
sources.note: Not derived from any third-party corpus — a small, manually written list of common English word pairs and rough counts, used only to demonstrate/enable context-aware scoring. Persian, Arabic, and German have no bigram asset yet; the model returns a neutral score for them.
